headline: Man Uses 47 Different Mugs In One Day, Refuses To Wash Them, Now Has 'Mug Mountain'
summary: The mountain is now a geological feature. His wife is 'negotiating a treaty.'
fullBody: Jake uses a new mug for every drink. He has 47 mugs in his sink. 'It's a collection,' Jake said. His wife calls it 'Mug Mountain.' 'It's a problem,' she said. 'It's a system,' Jake said. The mountain is now 3 feet tall. Jake has started a 'mug rotation' schedule. He has not washed a mug in 2 weeks. 'I'm very organized,' Jake said. His wife is considering a divorce.
